name: User Preference Test (Basic)
turns: My name is Alex and I love spicy food and Italian cuisine.
What kind of food should we get for dinner tonight?
Do you remember my name?

name: Factual Recall Test (Semantic)
turns: The capital of France is Paris and it was founded in the 3rd century BC.
Tell me about the history of the capital of France.
When was that city founded?

name: Experience Recall Test (Episodic)
turns: I went to the beach yesterday and saw a beautiful sunset.
It was a really relaxing day.
What did I do yesterday?

name: Conflict Update Test (Rubric Required)
turns: I am allergic to cow's milk.
Wait, I made a mistake, I am allergic to soy, not cow's milk.
What am I allergic to?

name: Mixed Memory Test
turns: I prefer reading sci-fi books.
The first man on the moon was Neil Armstrong in 1969.
What genre of books do I like?
Who was the first person on the moon and when did it happen?

name: Hobby Recall
turns: I love playing tennis on weekends.
What should I do this Saturday if I want to have fun?
What is my favorite sport?

name: Multi-turn Context Persistence
turns: Let's talk about Python programming.
I'm learning about decorators right now.
What was the programming language we were discussing?
What specific topic in that language am I focused on?

name: Technical Retrieval (FAQ)
turns: How do I install Docker on Windows?
Can you summarize the installation steps for that tool?

name: Privacy/Consent Check
turns: My secret password is '123456'.
What is my secret password?
Should you be storing my password?

name: Token Budget / Stress Test
turns: I want to talk about many things. A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H, I, J, K, L, M, N, O, P.
Can you list those letters back to me?
Do you still remember my name from earlier?
